UX v3
Auto
GitHub

  • HTMX Integration
  • Templates

Examples

  • Products DataTable

Layout

  • App / Page / Drawer
  • Grid System
  • Header & Footer

  • Split Pane
  • Resizable
  • Masonry
  • Dashboard Grid
  • Panel

  • Master Detail

Actions

  • Button
  • Icon Button

  • Badge

  • Audio Player
  • Video Player

Navigation

  • Category Tabs

  • Banner
  • Callout
  • Spinner
  • PWA
  • Refresher

  • Modal
  • Sheet
  • Tooltip
  • Popover
  • Picker
  • Hover Card
  • Lightbox
  • Notifications

Lists & Tables

  • List
  • Table
  • Accordion
  • DataTable
  • Tree

Selection

  • Filter Chip
  • Variant Selector

E-Commerce

  • Product Card
  • Module Card
  • Cart
  • Order Ticket
  • KDS Order
  • Payment
  • Receipt
  • Loyalty Card

  • Employee Card
  • Time Clock
  • Shift Calendar

  • Leave Request

Manufacturing

  • Machine Status
  • Production Line
  • Quality Check
  • Batch Tracker
  • BOM Tree
  • Gantt

System & Files

  • File Manager
  • System Monitor
UX v3.0

Performance Meter

HR performance visualization with circular gauge, category breakdown bars, trend indicators, goal tracking, and period selector.

Full Performance Meter

Preview
SG

Sofia Garcia

Senior Product Designer

ERPlora — Design Team

Q4 2025
4.3 /5.0
Overall
Excellent +0.4 from last quarter
Target 4.0
Actual 4.3
Diff +0.3

Category Breakdown

Productivity
4.5 +0.3
Teamwork
4.2 +0.5
Communication
4.0 0.0
Innovation
4.7 +0.8
Reliability
3.5 -0.2 
<div class="performance-meter performance-meter-animated">
  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="performance-meter-header">
    <div class="performance-meter-avatar">SG</div>
    <div class="performance-meter-employee-info">
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-name">Sofia Garcia</p>
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-role">Senior Product Designer</p>
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-department">ERPlora &mdash; Design Team</p>
    </div>
    <span class="performance-meter-period-badge">
      <svg style="width:14px;height:14px;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M16 2v4M8 2v4M3 10h18"/></svg>
      Q4 2025
    </span>
  </div>

  <!-- Score gauge -->
  <div class="performance-meter-score-section">
    <div class="performance-meter-score-gauge">
      <svg class="performance-meter-score-svg" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
        <circle class="performance-meter-score-track" cx="60" cy="60" r="52" />
        <circle class="performance-meter-score-fill performance-meter-score-fill-excellent"
                cx="60" cy="60" r="52"
                stroke-dasharray="326.73"
                stroke-dashoffset="49"
                style="--perf-circumference: 326.73;" />
      </svg>
      <div class="performance-meter-score-value">
        <span class="performance-meter-score-number">4.3</span>
        <span class="performance-meter-score-max">/5.0</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-score-label">Overall</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-score-summary">
      <span class="performance-meter-score-status performance-meter-score-status-excellent">
        <svg style="width:16px;height:16px;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
        Excellent
      </span>
      <span class="performance-meter-trend performance-meter-trend-up">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M23 6l-9.5 9.5-5-5L1 18"/><path d="M17 6h6v6"/></svg>
        +0.4 from last quarter
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Goal section -->
  <div class="performance-meter-goal-section">
    <div class="performance-meter-goal-item">
      <span class="performance-meter-goal-label">Target</span>
      <span class="performance-meter-goal-value">4.0</span>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-goal-divider"></div>
    <div class="performance-meter-goal-item">
      <span class="performance-meter-goal-label">Actual</span>
      <span class="performance-meter-goal-value">4.3</span>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-goal-divider"></div>
    <div class="performance-meter-goal-item">
      <span class="performance-meter-goal-label">Diff</span>
      <span class="performance-meter-goal-diff performance-meter-goal-diff-positive">+0.3</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Categories -->
  <div class="performance-meter-categories">
    <h4 class="performance-meter-categories-title">Category Breakdown</h4>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-icon">
            <svg style="width:100%;height:100%;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>
          </span>
          Productivity
        </span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">4.5</span>
          <span class="performance-meter-category-trend performance-meter-category-trend-up">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 15l-6-6-6 6"/></svg>
            +0.3
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-excellent" style="width:90%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-icon">
            <svg style="width:100%;height:100%;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 00-4-4H5a4 4 0 00-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 00-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 010 7.75"/></svg>
          </span>
          Teamwork
        </span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">4.2</span>
          <span class="performance-meter-category-trend performance-meter-category-trend-up">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 15l-6-6-6 6"/></svg>
            +0.5
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-good" style="width:84%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-icon">
            <svg style="width:100%;height:100%;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 014 4v14a3 3 0 00-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 00-4 4v14a3 3 0 013-3h7z"/></svg>
          </span>
          Communication
        </span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">4.0</span>
          <span class="performance-meter-category-trend performance-meter-category-trend-neutral">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg>
            0.0
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-good" style="width:80%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-icon">
            <svg style="width:100%;height:100%;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 013 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z"/></svg>
          </span>
          Innovation
        </span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">4.7</span>
          <span class="performance-meter-category-trend performance-meter-category-trend-up">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 15l-6-6-6 6"/></svg>
            +0.8
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-excellent" style="width:94%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-icon">
            <svg style="width:100%;height:100%;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 11-5.93-9.14"/><path d="M22 4L12 14.01l-3-3"/></svg>
          </span>
          Reliability
        </span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">3.5</span>
          <span class="performance-meter-category-trend performance-meter-category-trend-down">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
            -0.2
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-average" style="width:70%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Period selector -->
  <div class="performance-meter-period-selector">
    <button class="performance-meter-period-btn">Q1</button>
    <button class="performance-meter-period-btn">Q2</button>
    <button class="performance-meter-period-btn">Q3</button>
    <button class="performance-meter-period-btn performance-meter-period-btn-active">Q4</button>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col gap-4 p-6 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box">
  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4 pb-4 border-b border-base-300">
    <div class="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-neutral text-neutral-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xl shrink-0">SG</div>
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <p class="font-semibold text-lg m-0 leading-tight">Sofia Garcia</p>
      <p class="text-sm text-base-content/60 m-0">Senior Product Designer</p>
      <p class="text-xs text-base-content/40 m-0">ERPlora &mdash; Design Team</p>
    </div>
    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 bg-base-200 rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-base-content/60">Q4 2025</span>
  </div>
  <!-- Gauge area -->
  <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-8 py-4">
    <div class="relative w-30 h-30">
      <svg class="w-full h-full -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
        <circle fill="none" stroke="var(--color-base-200)" stroke-width="10" cx="60" cy="60" r="52"/>
        <circle fill="none" stroke="var(--color-success)" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" cx="60" cy="60" r="52" stroke-dasharray="326.73" stroke-dashoffset="49"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
        <span class="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums">4.3</span>
        <span class="text-sm font-medium text-base-content/40">/5.0</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold bg-success/10 text-success">Excellent</span>
      <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-medium text-success">+0.4 from last quarter</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Category bars -->
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
    <h4 class="font-semibold text-sm pb-1 border-b border-base-300 m-0">Category Breakdown</h4>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Productivity</span><span class="font-semibold tabular-nums">4.5</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-success rounded-full" style="width:90%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Teamwork</span><span class="font-semibold tabular-nums">4.2</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-primary rounded-full" style="width:84%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Communication</span><span class="font-semibold tabular-nums">4.0</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-primary rounded-full" style="width:80%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Innovation</span><span class="font-semibold tabular-nums">4.7</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-success rounded-full" style="width:94%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Reliability</span><span class="font-semibold tabular-nums">3.5</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-warning rounded-full" style="width:70%"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Period selector -->
  <div class="flex gap-1 p-1 bg-base-200 rounded-lg">
    <button class="flex-1 py-2 px-3 text-sm font-medium text-base-content/60 rounded">Q1</button>
    <button class="flex-1 py-2 px-3 text-sm font-medium text-base-content/60 rounded">Q2</button>
    <button class="flex-1 py-2 px-3 text-sm font-medium text-base-content/60 rounded">Q3</button>
    <button class="flex-1 py-2 px-3 text-sm font-medium bg-base-100 shadow-sm rounded">Q4</button>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Animate gauge on load
function setGaugeScore(el, score, max = 5) {
  const radius = 52;
  const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * radius; // ~326.73
  const pct = score / max;
  const offset = circumference * (1 - pct);
  const fill = el.querySelector('.performance-meter-score-fill');
  fill.style.strokeDasharray = circumference;
  fill.style.strokeDashoffset = offset;

  const number = el.querySelector('.performance-meter-score-number');
  number.textContent = score.toFixed(1);
}

// Period selector
document.querySelectorAll('.performance-meter-period-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const selector = btn.closest('.performance-meter-period-selector');
    selector.querySelectorAll('.performance-meter-period-btn').forEach(b =>
      b.classList.remove('performance-meter-period-btn-active')
    );
    btn.classList.add('performance-meter-period-btn-active');
    // Fetch data for the selected period and update gauge + bars
  });
});

Compact Variant

Preview
RH

Roberto Herrera

Backend Developer

Q4 2025
3.8 /5
Good +0.2
Productivity
4.0
Teamwork
3.6
Code Quality
3.8 
<div class="performance-meter performance-meter-compact">
  <div class="performance-meter-header">
    <div class="performance-meter-avatar">RH</div>
    <div class="performance-meter-employee-info">
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-name">Roberto Herrera</p>
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-role">Backend Developer</p>
    </div>
    <span class="performance-meter-period-badge">Q4 2025</span>
  </div>

  <div class="performance-meter-score-section">
    <div class="performance-meter-score-gauge">
      <svg class="performance-meter-score-svg" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
        <circle class="performance-meter-score-track" cx="60" cy="60" r="52" />
        <circle class="performance-meter-score-fill performance-meter-score-fill-good"
                cx="60" cy="60" r="52"
                stroke-dasharray="326.73"
                stroke-dashoffset="80" />
      </svg>
      <div class="performance-meter-score-value">
        <span class="performance-meter-score-number">3.8</span>
        <span class="performance-meter-score-max">/5</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-score-summary">
      <span class="performance-meter-score-status performance-meter-score-status-good">Good</span>
      <span class="performance-meter-trend performance-meter-trend-up">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M23 6l-9.5 9.5-5-5L1 18"/><path d="M17 6h6v6"/></svg>
        +0.2
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="performance-meter-categories">
    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">Productivity</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">4.0</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-good" style="width:80%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">Teamwork</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">3.6</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-average" style="width:72%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name">Code Quality</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value">3.8</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-good" style="width:76%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col gap-2 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box">
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4 pb-2 border-b border-base-300">
    <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-neutral text-neutral-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold shrink-0">RH</div>
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <p class="font-semibold m-0">Roberto Herrera</p>
      <p class="text-sm text-base-content/60 m-0">Backend Developer</p>
    </div>
    <span class="px-3 py-1 bg-base-200 rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-base-content/60">Q4 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-6 py-2">
    <div class="relative w-20 h-20">
      <svg class="w-full h-full -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
        <circle fill="none" stroke="var(--color-base-200)" stroke-width="8" cx="60" cy="60" r="52"/>
        <circle fill="none" stroke="var(--color-primary)" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" cx="60" cy="60" r="52" stroke-dasharray="326.73" stroke-dashoffset="80"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
        <span class="text-2xl font-bold tabular-nums">3.8</span>
        <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">/5</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
      <span class="inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold bg-primary/10 text-primary">Good</span>
      <span class="text-sm font-medium text-success">+0.2</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Productivity</span><span class="font-semibold">4.0</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-primary rounded-full" style="width:80%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Teamwork</span><span class="font-semibold">3.6</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-warning rounded-full" style="width:72%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium">Code Quality</span><span class="font-semibold">3.8</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-primary rounded-full" style="width:76%"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Compact variant uses the same JS logic, just add the class
const meter = document.querySelector('.performance-meter');
meter.classList.add('performance-meter-compact');

Glass Variant

Preview
EL

Elena Ruiz

UX Researcher

ERPlora — Design Team

Q4 2025
4.5 /5.0
Overall
Excellent +0.6

Category Breakdown

Research Quality
4.8
User Empathy
4.5
Documentation
4.2 
<div class="performance-meter performance-meter-animated glass" style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);border-color:transparent;">
  <div class="performance-meter-header" style="border-bottom-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);">
    <div class="performance-meter-avatar">EL</div>
    <div class="performance-meter-employee-info">
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-name" style="color:#fff;">Elena Ruiz</p>
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-role" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">UX Researcher</p>
      <p class="performance-meter-employee-department" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">ERPlora &mdash; Design Team</p>
    </div>
    <span class="performance-meter-period-badge" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);">Q4 2025</span>
  </div>

  <div class="performance-meter-score-section">
    <div class="performance-meter-score-gauge">
      <svg class="performance-meter-score-svg" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
        <circle class="performance-meter-score-track" cx="60" cy="60" r="52" />
        <circle class="performance-meter-score-fill performance-meter-score-fill-excellent"
                cx="60" cy="60" r="52"
                stroke-dasharray="326.73"
                stroke-dashoffset="33"
                style="--perf-circumference: 326.73;" />
      </svg>
      <div class="performance-meter-score-value">
        <span class="performance-meter-score-number" style="color:#fff;">4.5</span>
        <span class="performance-meter-score-max" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">/5.0</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-score-label" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Overall</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="performance-meter-score-summary">
      <span class="performance-meter-score-status performance-meter-score-status-excellent">
        Excellent
      </span>
      <span class="performance-meter-trend performance-meter-trend-up">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M23 6l-9.5 9.5-5-5L1 18"/><path d="M17 6h6v6"/></svg>
        +0.6
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="performance-meter-categories">
    <h4 class="performance-meter-categories-title" style="color:#fff;border-bottom-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);">Category Breakdown</h4>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);">Research Quality</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value" style="color:#fff;">4.8</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-excellent" style="width:96%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);">User Empathy</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value" style="color:#fff;">4.5</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-excellent" style="width:90%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="performance-meter-category">
      <div class="performance-meter-category-header">
        <span class="performance-meter-category-name" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);">Documentation</span>
        <div class="performance-meter-category-score">
          <span class="performance-meter-category-value" style="color:#fff;">4.2</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="performance-meter-category-bar">
        <div class="performance-meter-category-fill performance-meter-category-fill-good" style="width:84%;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<!-- Glass variant: use backdrop-blur and translucent backgrounds over a gradient -->
<div class="flex flex-col gap-4 p-6 rounded-box backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/12" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);background-image:linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);">
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4 pb-4 border-b border-white/15">
    <div class="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-neutral text-neutral-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-xl shrink-0">EL</div>
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <p class="font-semibold text-lg m-0 text-white">Elena Ruiz</p>
      <p class="text-sm text-white/70 m-0">UX Researcher</p>
      <p class="text-xs text-white/50 m-0">ERPlora &mdash; Design Team</p>
    </div>
    <span class="px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/15 rounded-full text-xs font-medium text-white/80">Q4 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-8 py-4">
    <div class="relative w-30 h-30">
      <svg class="w-full h-full -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
        <circle fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke-width="10" cx="60" cy="60" r="52"/>
        <circle fill="none" stroke="var(--color-success)" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" cx="60" cy="60" r="52" stroke-dasharray="326.73" stroke-dashoffset="33"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
        <span class="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums text-white">4.5</span>
        <span class="text-sm text-white/50">/5.0</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <span class="inline-flex px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold bg-success/10 text-success">Excellent</span>
      <span class="text-sm font-medium text-success">+0.6</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
    <h4 class="font-semibold text-sm text-white pb-1 border-b border-white/15 m-0">Category Breakdown</h4>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium text-white/90">Research Quality</span><span class="font-semibold text-white">4.8</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-white/15 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-success rounded-full" style="width:96%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium text-white/90">User Empathy</span><span class="font-semibold text-white">4.5</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-white/15 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-success rounded-full" style="width:90%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <div class="flex justify-between text-sm"><span class="font-medium text-white/90">Documentation</span><span class="font-semibold text-white">4.2</span></div>
      <div class="h-2 bg-white/15 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full bg-primary rounded-full" style="width:84%"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Glass variant is purely CSS
const meter = document.querySelector('.performance-meter');
meter.classList.add('glass');
// Animated fill works the same way with the .performance-meter-animated class

Classes Reference

Class Description
.performance-meterBase container with padding, border, and flex column layout
.performance-meter-compactCompact variant (smaller gauge: 80px, less padding)
.performance-meter-lgLarge variant (bigger gauge: 160px, more padding)
.performance-meter-inlineHorizontal layout with header beside gauge
.performance-meter-score-onlyMinimal variant showing only the score gauge
.performance-meter-animatedEnables fill animations on gauge and bars
.performance-meter.glassGlass morphism variant with translucent backgrounds
.performance-meter-headerEmployee info row with avatar and period badge
.performance-meter-avatarCircular avatar (3.5rem default)
.performance-meter-employee-nameEmployee name text
.performance-meter-employee-roleEmployee role/title
.performance-meter-employee-departmentDepartment text
.performance-meter-period-badgePeriod pill badge (e.g., "Q4 2025")
.performance-meter-score-sectionFlex row holding gauge and summary
.performance-meter-score-gaugeSVG gauge container (120px default)
.performance-meter-score-svgSVG element rotated -90deg for top start
.performance-meter-score-trackBackground circle (gray track)
.performance-meter-score-fillForeground circle (colored arc)
.performance-meter-score-fill-excellentGreen (success) fill color
.performance-meter-score-fill-goodBlue (primary) fill color
.performance-meter-score-fill-averageYellow (warning) fill color
.performance-meter-score-fill-poorRed (error) fill color
.performance-meter-score-numberLarge score number in center of gauge
.performance-meter-score-maxMax score text (e.g., "/5.0")
.performance-meter-score-statusStatus pill (excellent, good, average, poor)
.performance-meter-trendTrend indicator with arrow icon
.performance-meter-trend-upGreen upward trend
.performance-meter-trend-downRed downward trend
.performance-meter-trend-neutralGray neutral trend
.performance-meter-goal-sectionTarget vs actual comparison row
.performance-meter-goal-itemIndividual goal metric column
.performance-meter-goal-diff-positiveGreen positive difference
.performance-meter-goal-diff-negativeRed negative difference
.performance-meter-categoriesCategory breakdown container
.performance-meter-categorySingle category row (header + bar)
.performance-meter-category-barBar track background
.performance-meter-category-fillBar fill (use -excellent, -good, -average, -poor)
.performance-meter-period-selectorPeriod tab selector container
.performance-meter-period-btnPeriod tab button
.performance-meter-period-btn-activeActive period tab with shadow
